legacyOptions.expr: {container="radarr"}|="DownloadService" | pattern `[<level>] <service>: Report for <Movie> sent to Transmission from indexer <indexer>. <file>`

spec.expr: sum by(pod)( kube_pod_info{created_by_kind!="Job"} AND ON (pod, namespace) kube_pod_status_ready{condition="false"} == 1)

spec.description: High-level view of Kubernetes cluster - useful for monitoring, alerting and troubleshooting.
No data is generally a good thing here.
spec.title: Container Average Restarts Per 30mins

spec.description:
Calculates rate at which CPU throttling periods occur for each namespace over last 1 minute.

CPU throttling happens when containers exceed their allocated quota.

Example: rate of 0.05, means throttling occurring 0.05 periods per second - or once every 20 seconds (on average).
spec.title: CPU Throttled Periods (Pod)

spec.description: IOps for Longhorn Volumes
spec.title: Volume IOps

spec.description: Latency for Longhorn Volumes
spec.title: Volume Latency

spec.description: IO percent for node disks
spec.title: Node Disk IO Time

spec.description: Power usage for all devices
spec.title: Device Power Usage

spec.description: Total CPU and Memory usage for Longhorn
spec.title: Longhorn CPU and Memory Usage

spec.description: Annual energy cost to run equipment
spec.title: 💰 Power $

spec.description:
UPS runtime

Calculation comes from:
Backup Time (in hours) = Battery Capacity (in Ah) X Input voltage (V) / Total Load (in Watts)

Calculation divided by 2 for conservative estimation.
spec.title: 🏃🏼‍♀️ Runtime

spec.description: Cluster linting score
spec.title: 💪 Score

spec.description: Current detailed view of running applications in the cluster
spec.title: App Details

spec.expr:
{cluster="default", detected_level="error"}
  | logfmt
  | job != `loki/nginx`
  | container !~ `grafana|popeye|sillytavern|unifi-poller|scrypted|distributor|querier|postgres-exporter`
  | line !~ `SocketSlack|has.* snapshot|motion recording closed`

{cluster="default", level="error"}
  | logfmt
  | job != `loki/nginx`
  | container !~ `grafana|popeye|sillytavern|unifi-poller|scrypted|distributor|querier|postgres-exporter`
  | line !~ `SocketSlack|has.* snapshot|motion recording closed`

spec.description: List of logs in the cluster with "error" in the message
spec.title: Recent Errors

spec.description: Percentage of traffic that was blocked due to DNS filtering (Ads, CIPA, etc)
spec.title: ⛔ Traffic

spec.description: Total of all disk operations performed over the specified range
spec.title: 💾 Disk Ops

spec.description: Temperature of rpi nodes
spec.title: Node Temperature

spec.query: SELECT count("mood") FROM "reflection" WHERE ("user"::tag = 'Jared') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY fill(null)

spec.description: When the last reflection was logged
spec.title: 🪞 Reflection

spec.expr: count_over_time({container="dawarich-app"} | pattern `Enqueued Tracks::RealtimeGenerationJob (Job ID: <job_id>) to Sidekiq(tracks) at <timestamp> UTC with arguments: 1` | timestamp =~ `[\d]?` [$__auto])

spec.description: When the last dawarich location was logged
spec.title: 🗺️ Dawarich

spec.expr:
sum by (node) (rate((coredns_cache_requests_total{container="cloudflared"}[1m]))
  * on(namespace, pod)
    group_left(node)
    kube_pod_info)*60

(
  sum by (project) (
    increase(supavisor_client_network_recv[12h])
    +
    increase(supavisor_client_network_send[12h])
  )
)
-
(
  sum by (project) (
    increase(supavisor_client_network_recv[12h] offset 12h)
    +
    increase(supavisor_client_network_send[12h] offset 12h)
  )
)

spec.description: Delta for the amount of data (increase or decrease)
spec.title: Postgres 24h Egress Change

spec.description: Estimation of the monthly egress consumption for databases
spec.title: Postgres Monthly Egress Estimation

spec.expr:
(
  (
    sum by (project) (
      increase(supavisor_client_network_recv[12h])
      +
      increase(supavisor_client_network_send[12h])
    )
    -
    sum by (project) (
      increase(supavisor_client_network_recv[12h] offset 12h)
      +
      increase(supavisor_client_network_send[12h] offset 12h)
    )
  )
)
/
clamp_min(
  sum by (project) (
    increase(supavisor_client_network_recv[12h] offset 12h)
    +
    increase(supavisor_client_network_send[12h] offset 12h)
  ),
  10 * 1024 * 1024  # 10 MB floor
)

spec.description: Percentage trend for egress (positive is bad, negative is good)
spec.title: Postgres Egress Percent Trend

spec.description: Max power consumed by PoE devices
spec.title: ⚡ PoE

spec.description:
Calculates CPU usage for each pod

CPU throttling happens when containers exceed their allocated quota.

Example: rate of 0.05, means throttling occurring 0.05 periods per second - or once every 20 seconds (on average).
spec.title: CPU Usage (Pod)

spec.description: No data is generally a good thing here.
spec.title: Container Average Restarts Per 30 mins (Namespace)
